speaker: Speaker A
text: Hey everyone, welcome to the design review meeting.

text: Yeah, I actually had some thoughts on that already.

speaker: Speaker A

text: Right, so I was thinking we could simplify the sidebar.

text: Sorry, go ahead.

text: I already started working on that, actually.

text: Hold on, let me finish the overview first.

speaker: Speaker B
text: I know, but the solution was obvious: just add caching.

speaker: Speaker A
text: So, users also mentioned the loading times were too slow.

speaker: Speaker B
text: Why not?

speaker: Speaker B
text: It works perfectly fine.

speaker: Speaker A
text: We need to optimize the dashboard queries.

text: Fine, let's discuss it then.

text: Wait, what?

text: Oh, that's a good point.

speaker: Speaker B
text: We should add ARIA labels.

speaker: Speaker A
text: That's not necessarily the right approach, though, because we need to consider the data freshness requirements.

speaker: Speaker B
text: Also about the sidebar thing I mentioned earlier.

speaker: Speaker B
text: Dark mode is easy.

speaker: Speaker B
text: I can do that in a day.

speaker: Speaker A
text: Screen readers can't parse our charts.

speaker: Speaker A
text: Exactly, and we need alt text for all the data visualizations.

speaker: Speaker A
text: Let me wrap up the feedback list first, please.

speaker: Speaker A

speaker: Speaker A

speaker: Speaker A
